data.body: RECONCILIATION APPLIED + VERIFIED (2026-07-11): retired all 13 orphan EDIT files (.json -> .json.retired) in two commits on the tickets branch (12 then the final fa98), and deleted all 4 local phantom dirs (110e/957d/9fa4/cf5d). Post-fix 'rebar fsck' = ZERO orphan_event + ZERO missing_create (only a transient push_pending, now pushed). Before/after status+assignee of all 13 orphan tickets is IDENTICAL (all closed; assignees empty except cc5b + f112 = 'Joe Oakhart') — no displayed state changed. tickets branch pushed to origin.
